# Requirements Traceability Matrix (RTM)  

## Purpose of the RTM

This RTM ensures that **all requirements are traceable** to:

- Business objectives (OKR 2.1)
- Ecological value
- WBS work packages
- Executive KPIs
- Acceptance authorities

No requirement may be implemented or changed without traceability.

---

## RTM Table

| Req ID | Requirement Summary | Type | OKR / KR | KPI | WBS ID | Validation Authority |
|---------|-----------------|---|:----------:|:-------:|:--------:|:---------------------|
| BR-01 | Reduce manual screening | Business | KR1 | KPI-1 | 1.4 | Sponsor |
| BR-02 | Reduce analysis time | Business | KR2 | KPI-2 | 1.4 | Sponsor |
| BR-03 | Protect benthic data | Environmental | KR3 | KPI-3 | 1.5 | SME Lead |
| BR-04 | Enable reuse | Business | KR4 | KPI-4 | 1.6 | Sponsor |
| BR-05 | Create digital assets | Strategic | KR5 | KPI-5 | 1.6 | Data Gov |
| ER-01 | Benthic relevance protection | Ecological | KR3 | KPI-3 | 1.5 | SME Lead |
| ER-02 | Human ecological authority | Ecological | KR3 | KPI-3 | 1.5 | SME Lead |
| ER-03 | Transparency of limits | Ecological | KR3 | KPI-3 | 1.4 | SME Lead |
| ER-04 | Cross-field consistency | Ecological | KR4 | KPI-4 | 1.5 | SME Lead |
| FR-01 | AUV image ingestion | Functional | KR1 | KPI-1 | 1.3 | Eng Lead |
| FR-06 | AI-assisted annotation | Functional | KR1 | KPI-1 | 1.4 | SME Lead |
| FR-09 | Binary classification | Functional | KR1/KR3 | KPI-3 | 1.4 | SME Lead |
| FR-12 | Dataset versioning | Functional | KR5 | KPI-5 | 1.6 | Data Gov |
| NFR-01 | Scalability | Non-Functional | KR2 | KPI-2 | 1.4 | PM |
| NFR-02 | Offline-first | Non-Functional | KR2 | KPI-2 | 1.4 | PM |
| NFR-05 | Security | Non-Functional | KR5 | KPI-5 | 1.6 | IT |

---

## Traceability Rules

- Every requirement must map to at least:
  - One KR
  - One KPI
  - One WBS element
- Any unmapped requirement is invalid
- Changes require RTM update and approval

---

## Governance Usage

The RTM is used for:

- Scope control
- Impact analysis of changes
- Stage-Gate reviews
- Audit and compliance evidence

---

## Baseline and Control

This RTM is baselined with the PMP.  
Any change requires formal change control.

---

## Approval

| Role | Name | Signature | Date |
|-----|---------|------------------|------|
| Sponsor (NOAA / SUB) | {{< meta executive-sponsor >}} | | |
| Environmental SME Lead | {{< meta sme-lead >}} | | |
| Project Owner | {{< meta project-po >}} | | |
